title: Initialize SLIP oversized test buffer
description: Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. slip_transport firmware fails -Werror=maybe-uninitialized because its oversized payload array is passed to slip_transport_send without initialization. Initialize the test vector deterministically and retain the oversized rejection oracle.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Oversized payload has deterministic independent contents. 2. Rejection expectation remains unchanged. 3. Native64 SLIP firmware boots and all ztests pass. 4. Three independent review passes complete.
close_reason: Initialized the oversized SLIP payload deterministically without changing rejection behavior; Native64 firmware boots and all cases pass; review completed.
